benefits.description: Felt warmth and arousal approximately 3 hours after injection; effects lasted at least 12 hours; orgasm stronger, increased vaginal wetness

side_effects.description: Felt nauseous about 10 minutes after injection; pre-medicated with Zofran
Got very tired and fell asleep after injection
Had trouble going back to sleep after 3am waking

protocol_notes: Mixed 1ml into 10mg PT-141; took 0.5mg (5 units on insulin syringe); took Zofran ~30 minutes before injection as anti-nausea pre-treatment. Injected at 8pm. Effects noted starting around 11pm. OP mentioned intending to try up to 2mg before concluding non-response. Reported no hangover effects.
